TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Taywan_Pasiwali, title = Taywan_Pasiwali, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taywan_Pasiwali} }

S.FORM: O sowal no Pangcah konini "Pasiwali" sanay, o kasadakan no cidal, o karengawan a ma'orip no 'alomanay a finacadan ko sawali hananay. Ona Piparadiwan a romi'ad hananay i, mikitini i 22 a romi'ad no sako 10 a folad a misatapang, pararid to tosa a romi'ad. Ira a matahidang ko papitoay nai romaay a kitakit ato no i Taywangay to a sa'opo no maradiway. Macacadacada a masadak a romadiw cangra. I taliyok nona piki'arawan i, ira aca ko paliwalay to no Yincumin a maamaan. Saka, caay ko pitengil aca to karomadiw, mapatalahkal ko no Yincumin a laliwalen. Taywan Pasiwali 2022 "Taywan Pasiwali" (PASIWALI音樂節) hananay i, o Piparadiwan a romi'ad no kukusay konini. O maradiway no Paliwan ci Utjung Tjakivalid , yo lahci han ningra romadiw ko pinapina a radiw nira i, mafawfaw ko faloco' no mitengilay a tamdaw, a mikihatiya toya radiw nira a misawahowaho a makero. Tona ira ko picara no lifong, saka mapahanhan to tosa a mihcaan kona "Taywang Pasiwali" hananay tono kukusay Piparadiwan a romi'ad, miliyaw aca a mitahidang to nai Filipingay, i Palaway, i Intonisiyaay, ato i Malaysiyaay a maradiway a sa'opo. Matengil itini ko makapahay a radiw no masasilomalomaay a finacadan.
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ ko~unini "pasiwaɾi" sanaj, o~u kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, o~u karəŋawan a maʡo~urip no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u sawaɾi ħananaj. o~una piparaɬ~ɮiwan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħananaj i, mikitini i ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u sako~u ** a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a misatapaŋ, parariɬ~ɮ to~u to~usa a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. ira a mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ ko~u papito~uaj nai ro~umaaj a kitakit ato~u no~u i tajwaŋaj to~u a saʡo~upo~u no~u maraɬ~ɮiwaj. maʦaʦaɬ~ɮaʦaɬ~ɮa a masaɬ~ɮak a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw ʦaŋra. i taɾijo~uk no~una pikiʡarawan i, ira aʦa ko~u paɾiwaɾaj to~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin a maamaan. saka, ʦaaj ko~u pitəŋiɾ aʦa to~u karo~umaɬ~ɮiw, mapataɾaħkaɾ ko~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin a ɾaɾiwaɾən. tajwan pasiwaɾi **** "tajwan pasiwaɾi" (pasiwaɾi***) ħananaj i, o~u piparaɬ~ɮiwan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u ko~u~uko~u~usaj ko~unini. o~u maraɬ~ɮiwaj no~u paɾiwan ʦi o~u~utjo~u~uŋ tjakib~vaɾiɬ~ɮ , jo~u ɾaħʦi ħan niŋra ro~umaɬ~ɮiw ko~u pinapina a raɬ~ɮiw nira i, mafawfaw ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u mitəŋiɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, a mikiħatija to~uja raɬ~ɮiw nira a misawaħo~uwaħo~u a makəro~u. to~una ira ko~u piʦara no~u ɾifo~uŋ, saka mapaħanħan to~u to~usa a miħʦaan ko~una "tajwaŋ pasiwaɾi" ħananaj to~uno~u ko~u~uko~u~usaj piparaɬ~ɮiwan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾijaw aʦa a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u nai fiɾipiŋaj, i paɾawaj, i into~unisijaaj, ato~u i maɾajsijaaj a maraɬ~ɮiwaj a saʡo~upo~u. matəŋiɾ itini ko~u makapaħaj a raɬ~ɮiw no~u masasiɾo~umaɾo~umaaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan.
S.FORM: O sowal no Pangcah konini "Pasiwali" sanay, o kasadakan no cidal, o karengawan a ma'orip no 'alomanay a finacadan ko sawali hananay. Ona Piparadiwan a romi'ad hananay i, mikitini i 22 a romi'ad no sako 10 a folad a misatapang, pararid to tosa a romi'ad. Ira a matahidang ko papitoay nai romaay a kitakit ato no i Taywangay to a sa'opo no maradiway. Macacadacada a masadak a romadiw cangra. I taliyok nona piki'arawan i, ira aca ko paliwalay to no Yincumin a maamaan. Saka, caay ko pitengil aca to karomadiw, mapatalahkal ko no Yincumin a laliwalen. Taywan Pasiwali 2022 "Taywan Pasiwali" (PASIWALI音樂節) hananay i, o Piparadiwan a romi'ad no kukusay konini. O maradiway no Paliwan ci Utjung Tjakivalid , yo lahci han ningra romadiw ko pinapina a radiw nira i, mafawfaw ko faloco' no mitengilay a tamdaw, a mikihatiya toya radiw nira a misawahowaho a makero. Tona ira ko picara no lifong, saka mapahanhan to tosa a mihcaan kona "Taywang Pasiwali" hananay tono kukusay Piparadiwan a romi'ad, miliyaw aca a mitahidang to nai Filipingay, i Palaway, i Intonisiyaay, ato i Malaysiyaay a maradiway a sa'opo. Matengil itini ko makapahay a radiw no masasilomalomaay a finacadan.
S.PHON: o~u so~uwaɾ no~u paŋʦaħ ko~unini "pasiwaɾi" sanaj, o~u kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ, o~u karəŋawan a maʡo~urip no~u ʡaɾo~umanaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u sawaɾi ħananaj. o~una piparaɬ~ɮiwan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħananaj i, mikitini i ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u sako~u ** a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a misatapaŋ, parariɬ~ɮ to~u to~usa a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. ira a mataħiɬ~ɮaŋ ko~u papito~uaj nai ro~umaaj a kitakit ato~u no~u i tajwaŋaj to~u a saʡo~upo~u no~u maraɬ~ɮiwaj. maʦaʦaɬ~ɮaʦaɬ~ɮa a masaɬ~ɮak a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw ʦaŋra. i taɾijo~uk no~una pikiʡarawan i, ira aʦa ko~u paɾiwaɾaj to~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin a maamaan. saka, ʦaaj ko~u pitəŋiɾ aʦa to~u karo~umaɬ~ɮiw, mapataɾaħkaɾ ko~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin a ɾaɾiwaɾən. tajwan pasiwaɾi **** "tajwan pasiwaɾi" (pasiwaɾi***) ħananaj i, o~u piparaɬ~ɮiwan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u ko~u~uko~u~usaj ko~unini. o~u maraɬ~ɮiwaj no~u paɾiwan ʦi o~u~utjo~u~uŋ tjakib~vaɾiɬ~ɮ , jo~u ɾaħʦi ħan niŋra ro~umaɬ~ɮiw ko~u pinapina a raɬ~ɮiw nira i, mafawfaw ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u mitəŋiɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, a mikiħatija to~uja raɬ~ɮiw nira a misawaħo~uwaħo~u a makəro~u. to~una ira ko~u piʦara no~u ɾifo~uŋ, saka mapaħanħan to~u to~usa a miħʦaan ko~una "tajwaŋ pasiwaɾi" ħananaj to~uno~u ko~u~uko~u~usaj piparaɬ~ɮiwan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾijaw aʦa a mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u nai fiɾipiŋaj, i paɾawaj, i into~unisijaaj, ato~u i maɾajsijaaj a maraɬ~ɮiwaj a saʡo~upo~u. matəŋiɾ itini ko~u makapaħaj a raɬ~ɮiw no~u masasiɾo~umaɾo~umaaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan.
